§ 1910.111 Storage and handling of anhydrous ammonia.
(v) On all hose one-half inch outside diameter and larger, used for the transfer of anhydrous ammonia liquid or vapor, there shall be etched, cast, or impressed at 5-foot intervals the following information. In lieu of this requirement the same information may be contained on a nameplate permanently attached to the hose. Table H-36 ---------- Surface area (sq. ft.) Flow rate CFM air ---------------------------------------- 20 258 25 310 30 360 35 408 40 455 45 501 50 547 55 591 60 635 65 678 70 720 75 762 80 804 85 845 90 885 95 925 100 965 105 1,010 110 1,050 115 1,090 120 1,120 125 1,160 130 1,200 135 1,240 140 1,280 145 1,310 150 1,350 155 1,390 160 1,420 165 1,460 170 1,500 175 1,530 180 1,570 185 1,600 190 1,640 195 1,670 200 1,710 210 1,780 220 1,850 230 1,920 240 1,980 250 2,050 260 2,120 270 2,180 280 2,250 290 2,320 300 2,380 310 2,450 320 2,510 330 2,570 340 2,640 350 2,700 360 2,760 370 2,830 380 2,890 390 2,950 400 3,010 450 3,320 500 3,620 550 3,910 600 4,200 650 4,480 700 4,760 750 5,040 800 5,300 850 5,590 900 5,850 950 6,120 1,000 6,380 1,050 6,640 1,100 6,900 1,150 7,160 1,200 7,410 1,250 7,660 1,300 7,910 1,350 8,160 1,400 8,410 1,450 8,650 1,500 8,900 1,550 9,140 1,600 9,380 1,650 9,620 1,700 9,860 1,750 10,090 1,800 10,330 1,850 10,560 1,900 10,800 1,950 11,030 2,000 11,260 2,050 11,490 2,100 11,720 2,150 11,950 2,200 12,180 2,250 12,400 2,300 12,630 2,350 12,850 2,400 13,080 2,450 13,300 2,500 13,520
